channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: TADI: Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence via Agentic LLM Orchestration over Heterogeneous Wellsite Data
item.description: arXiv:2605.00060v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present TADI (Tool-Augmented Drilling Intelligence), an agentic AI system that transforms drilling operational data into evidence-based analytical intelligence. Applied to the Equinor Volve Field dataset, TADI integrates 1,759 daily drilling report...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> analysis, API, model, framework, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: AgentReputation: A Decentralized Agentic AI Reputation Framework
item.description: arXiv:2605.00073v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Decentralized, agentic AI marketplaces are rapidly emerging to support software engineering tasks such as debugging, patch generation, and security auditing, often operating without centralized oversight. However, existing reputation mechanisms fail i...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, RAG, API, platform, research | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompt engineering, platform, prompt, model, large language model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context, API, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions
item.description: arXiv:2605.00837v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Entropic regularized optimal transport (OT) via the Sinkhorn algorithm has become a fundamental tool in machine learning, yet existing implementations either suffer from numerical instability for small regularization parameters or incur significant ov...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> image, library, analysis, memory, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
